name: AMOUAGE JUBILATION MAN EDP BOT
description: Jubilation XXV Man 100ml Woody Created for the enigmatic man carrying the essence of his philosophy and sophistication across all eras and cultures.

name: ATELIER DES ORS  ROUGE SARAY BOT
description: Rouge Sarây echoes the ancient trade routes that crossed the arid deserts of the Arabian Peninsula—vast landscapes of poetry and romance that inspired French writers, poets, and adventurers. Rouge like the sunlit dunes of Wadi Rum, the ochre-hued rock of Petra, and the warmth, passion, and generosity of the Middle East. Rouge like the amber glow of dates, the treasured fruit of the sands, long revered as a symbol of abundance and hospitality. Rouge Sarây sublimates the rich, gourmand aroma of dates to offer an olfactory experience that is at once sweet, fruity and velvety. Vanilla and heliotrope add depth, exuding intensity and conviviality. The power of sandalwood envelops the fragrance, while the smoky nuances of guaiac wood amplify its amber facet.

name: AMOUAGE OPUS VII RECKLESS LEATHER/24 EDP
description:
Opus VII is a green woody and leather evoking the juxtaposition of harmony with an intensity of recklessness.
24% oil concentration, 6 weeks ageing: 3 weeks maceration, 3 weeks maturation

name: ATELIER DES ORS  ROESE OMEYYADE  BOT
description: Rose Omeyyade is a rich and bewitching fragrance, inspired by the precious and captivating damask rose. Named after the Umayyad dynasty, it evokes the grandeur and opulence of the lavishly adorned Levantine palaces. This fragrance is a resounding ode to sensuality and refinement, reminiscent of the timeless beauty captured in orientalist paintings. A unique, elegant creation, embodying the exquisite spirit of the East.Rose Omeyyade opens with the rich, honeyed essence of Damask rose, offering a delicate floral intensity. As the fragrance develops, As the fragrance develops, the warmth of amber envelops the rose in a soft, resinous glow. Woody notes form an intense base, balancing floral richness with the boldness of woods. A harmonious amber floral composition, both sensual and bold.

name: ATELIER DES ORS  LUNE FELINE BOT
description: Lune Féline, like a magnetic star in the sky, captivates and fascinates the eye. This fragrance is an irresistible symphony of dark, sensual notes, inspired by the mystical radiance of the nocturnal star. Bold and bewitching, it exerts an intoxicating, mysterious and unforgettable attraction.Lune Féline opens with the vibrant warmth of spices, blending harmoniously with the richness of woods at its heart. A sensual, animalic quality emerges from Tahitian vanilla beans, enveloped by balsamic warmth and soft, musky accords. Together, these notes create a rich, gourmand trail that lingers in the air, with a bewitching beauty that captivates and enchants.

Created by renowned perfumer Karine Vinchon-Spehner, Overture Man is an operatic portrayal of a gentleman's mystique encapsulated in potent notes of Myrrh, Sandalwood and smoky Frankincense.

name: ATELIER DES ORS  PINK ME UP BOT
description: Pink Me Up sparkles and pops, with a mood boosting shine. Experience uplifting emotions with the radiating glow of happiness, joie de vivre and frivolity. Pink Me Up is like a joyous bubble of pleasure, swirling in a crystal glass, symbolising the pleasures of life. Discover the addictive fizz of champagne and the perfectly paired fruitiness of blackberry and bergamot. Pink Me Up’s addictive yet sophisticated scent unveils the delicacy of champagne and the blush of rose centifolia. Swirling floral notes of orange blossom and iris are amplified with seductive musk.

name: ATELIER DES ORS  BOIS SIKAR BOT
description: Founder Jean-Philippe Clermont’s deep connection to the world of cigars made the creation of a fragrance around this theme inevitable. From the outset, the vision was clear: the rich aroma of cigars, the cedar wood of cigar boxes, and the smoky depth of Islay whisky aged in oak barrels. Bois Sikar captures this atmosphere with intensity: addictive facets that entwine to create a fragrance with a unique character. This assertive fragrance unfolds in waves of smoldering tobacco, robust woods, and the peaty, heady vapors of fine single malt. The distinctive smokiness of Islay whisky is seamlessly woven into the composition, enhancing its bold and addictive character. Cedar leaf adds a fresh yet resinous touch, amplifying the intensity of this intoxicating gentleman's fragrance.

name: ATELIER DES ORS  CUIR SACRE BOT
description: Cuir Sacré was designed as an Andalusian dream, evoking the essence of a stroll through the historic streets of Córdoba. This Spanish city was once renowned for its Cuir de Cordoue, also known as Gold Leather—an exquisite craft that involved embossing delicate gold patterns onto leather hangings, used as opulent tapestries. A fragrance that captures the spirit of that tradition, reflecting the heritage and craftsmanship of a bygone era.Cuir Sacré highlights the bold character of dry woods and rich leather. The deep, textured leather notes are intensified by the warm, spicy touch of saffron, while earthy vetiver adds depth and freshness. This harmonious blend enhances the fragrance’s strong character, evoking the heritage of Cordoban leather with a modern, elegant twist.

name: AMOUAGE OPUS XIII SILVER OUD/24 EDP
description: Echoing life's most vivid and celebrated experiences shaped by moments of tribulation and strength, Silver Oud is an olfactive depiction of Stendhal's 19th-century French novel, The Red and the Black, and its intelligent and ambitious protagonist, Julien Sorel. Paying tribute to the House's signature storytelling tradition, Cecile Zorakian brings Silver Oud to life in a woody ambery Eau de Parfum that showcases the most precious Oud in all its glory.20% oil concentration, 6 weeks ageing: 3 weeks maceration, 3 weeks maturation

name: TERRE D'HERMES GIFT SET BOT
description: A spellbinding and novel interpretation of the Amouage triad of Rose, Frankincense and Ambergris, Guidance reads like a poem, smells like an embrace, and feels like a word of wisdom.Winner of the prestigious Best Perfume in High Luxury Award at Belgian Beauty Awards 2024.25% oil concentration, 4 weeks ageing: 1 weeks maceration, 3 weeks maturationThis beautifully presented Gift Set includes:1 x 100ml Guidance Eau de Parfum1 x 60ml Guidance Bath & Shower Gel1 x 60ml Guidance Body Lotion

name: NEW NOTES NEW LEATHER EDP
description:
The intense darkness of Leather Sadah is testament to the Oud Assam; it’s drawn from precious Agarwood trees found in north-eastern India. Unrivalled amounts of the ingredient are anchored by sweet vanilla absolute, but it’s the leather heart that gives the fragrance its name – the nomads of Al Saadah were known for crafting leather treasures only fit for royalty.
100% oil concentration, 4 weeks ageing, 4 weeks maturation
How to apply your Attar
Using the dabber, gently apply a drop of Attar Leather Sadah on your pulse point in a swift smear. Very gently, dab your wrists together so as to wake the Attar up. You may also apply a single drop of Attar to the tip of your finger, then dab your pulse points, without rubbing them.
Should you have any left on your finger, you may run your hand through your beard or your hair. Always apply your Attar on your skin.

name: VERSACE Woman BOTs
description:
This spicy oriental fragrance is inspired by the eternal legends of the ancient Silk Road from China to Arabia. In the mystical twilight with the desert wind blowing against her veil she follows the guiding light in search of the long lost aria. Beyond truth and immortality a Legend is born.
23% oil concentration, 6 weeks ageing: 3 weeks maceration, 3 weeks maturation
